    Methods in org.jscience.core.ui that return types with arguments of type Viewer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Viewer>
    MasterControlDiscovery.getProviders()
    Discovers all available Viewer implementations using ServiceLoader.
    Map<MasterControlDiscovery.ProviderType, Map<String, List<Viewer>>>
    MasterControlDiscovery.getProvidersByType()
    Discovers providers and groups them by type (APP, DEMO, VIEWER) and then by Category.
